name: Chocolate Zucchini Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the oil and sugar together.
2. Add the beaten eggs to the mixture.
3. Fold in the melted chocolate, zucchini, and vanilla.
4. Sift together the flour, salt, cinnamon, baking powder, and baking soda.
5. Stir the sifted dry ingredients into the wet mixture, along with nuts and chips.
6. Spoon the batter into 2 well-greased 9-inch x 5-inch pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
